images.alt: A page from issue #54 of IDW'S Sonic comic. Surge's hallucination of Dr. Starline taunts her. As she backs off, cornered against the room's walls. "Right back where you started... I built your body. I shaped your mind. You will ALWAYS be mine." Surge curls up and begins crying until Starline's hallucination vanishes when Kit hugs her. "I-I'm sorry I left you. I didn't know. PLEASE. Don't be upset."

record.text:
Man.
Surge's facade finally drops, this is genuine FEAR. Terror for her creator, her abusive father. She's finally tasted a brief but real taste of freedom, and the mere idea of going back to him terrified her
It doesn't matter if he's literally dead, the scars he's left run deep
Only Kit can help

images.alt: A page from issue #54 of IDW'S Sonic comic. Surge's hallucination of Dr. Starline taunts her. As she backs off, cornered against the room's walls. "Right back where you started... images.alt: A large anthropomorphic lizard man in a sleeveless shirt and boxer-briefs is sitting on a couch, hands resting on the shoulders of his crew mate. The crew mate in question is a similarly dressed anthropomorphic marten man also sitting on the couch, just inside the others spread legs, little spoon style. The two both have their eyes closed, the larger lizard man leans forward to whisper sweet nothings into the martens ear while holding him. The marten melts instantly and the two share a tender moment.

record.text:
A little off hours fraternization, for these two. 

Definitely could have put some more work into cleaning up or experimenting further, but I’ll call it for now 

#furryart
